{{Infobox character
| name = King of the Iron Legion
| aliases = Iron Legion King
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[King of the Iron Legion]] is a ten-foot-tall human-like figure wrapped in chrome armor with cybernetic and mystical connections.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] [[King]]'s body was lost due to the disruption of a ritual.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[King of the Iron Legion]] was once affected by [[Absolute Burial]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
